seoTitle: How to Create a Gantt Chart in Power BI
metaDescription: Build a Gantt chart in Power BI to visualize project timelines, track progress, and keep teams aligned on deadlines and deliverables.
intro: Gantt charts make project timelines easier to follow than a plain table of dates, especially when teams need to track progress and accountability together. This guide walks through setting up and customizing a Gantt chart in Power BI. It's useful for project managers and teams of any size looking to visualize their work more clearly.

steps.heading: Set up your project data
steps.body: Organize your dataset with task names, start dates, and durations or end dates, since these fields drive the Gantt chart's layout.

steps.heading: Create the Gantt chart
steps.body: Add the Gantt chart visual to your report and map your task and date fields into it.

steps.heading: Customize the chart
steps.body: Adjust colors, groupings, and labels so the timeline clearly reflects different tasks, phases, or team assignments.

steps.heading: Follow best practices and explore use cases
steps.body: Use the chart for practical scenarios like tracking deliverables across a project or comparing progress between team members.

steps.heading: Keep the chart updated
steps.body: Refresh your data regularly so the Gantt chart reflects the current state of the project rather than outdated timelines.

faq.question: Do I need a custom visual to build a Gantt chart in Power BI?
faq.answer: Gantt chart functionality is commonly available through a dedicated Gantt visual that you add to your report from the visualizations pane.

faq.question: What data do I need to build a Gantt chart?
faq.answer: You'll typically need task names along with start dates and either durations or end dates to plot the timeline correctly.

faq.question: Can a Gantt chart show task dependencies?
faq.answer: Depending on the visual used, some Gantt charts support showing dependencies, though this can vary by the specific visual's capabilities.

faq.question: Is a Power BI Gantt chart suitable for small projects?
faq.answer: Yes, it works for projects of any size, from small team tasks to larger, multi-phase initiatives.

faq.question: Can I filter the Gantt chart by team member or phase?
faq.answer: Yes, standard Power BI filtering can be applied to a Gantt chart just like any other visual on the report.
